summary: The documentation build job failed due to a SyntaxError encountered while converting a Markdown file to MDX format. The error occurred in the llama.md documentation file during the doc build process.
root_cause: A SyntaxError in '../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md' caused the MDX conversion step to fail, aborting the documentation build.

evidence.reason: Indicates a syntax error was encountered during parsing of the documentation file.

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Directly identifies the file causing the failure and confirms it is a syntax/conversion error during the MDX build step.

evidence.quote: raise type(e)(f"There was an error when converting {file} to the MDX format.\n" + e.args[0]) from e
evidence.reason: Shows the doc-builder re-raises the original SyntaxError with additional context about which file failed MDX conversion.

suggested_fix: Inspect and fix the invalid syntax in '../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md' — look for malformed MDX/JSX expressions, unclosed tags, or invalid characters that would cause a SyntaxError during MDX conversion.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
